name: prd-to-issues
description: Convert PRDs into dependency-aware implementation issue slices.

interface.shortDescription: Break PRDs into dependency-aware issue slices.
interface.longDescription: Transforms a PRD into thin vertical slices with blockers, HITL/AFK labels, and acceptance criteria templates.
defaultPrompt: Break this PRD into dependency-aware issue slices.
Create HITL/AFK issue candidates with blockers.
Generate issue bodies from this approved PRD.
